mapper.insert: INSERT INTO interviews ( user_id, title, job_role, career_level, tech_stack, difficulty, question_count, status ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{title}, #{jobRole}, #{careerLevel}, #{techStack}, #{difficulty}, #{questionCount}, 'READY' )
mapper.select: SELECT interview_id, user_id, title, job_role, career_level, tech_stack, difficulty, question_count, status, score, created_at, updated_at FROM interviews WHERE interview_id = #{interviewId}

SELECT interview_id, user_id, title, job_role, career_level, tech_stack, difficulty, question_count, status, score, created_at, updated_at FROM interviews WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{request.size} OFFSET #{request.offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE interviews SET status = 'COMPLETED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE interview_id = #{interviewId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM interviews WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()
